script_text: Fact books sometimes use fancy words.
But the text gives us clues to their meaning.
Let us learn to find them!
Sometimes the text just tells you what a word means.
A habitat is the place where an animal lives.
Other times you have to use the words around it.
The thirsty camel gulped a lot of water.
Gulp must mean drink fast! The thirst gave the clue.
Do not skip hard words. Slow down and look for clues.
Now you are ready to figure out word meanings!
